---
title: "lake_selection"
author: "Denver Link"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Library
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(ggspatial)
library(ggthemes)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(leaflet)
library(mwlaxeref)
```

# Data
```{r}
# lakes listed as infested with zebra mussels or starry through 2025
#this file was generated by
# 1. downloading the most recent DNR infested waters list
# 2. filtering species for zebra mussel and starry
# 3. copy and past into another excel and saving as csv
zm_ssw <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                             "Shared drives",
                             "Hansen Lab",
                             "RESEARCH PROJECTS",
                             "MAISRC Mercury Pathways 53.2",
                             "Data",
                             "zm_ssw_6jan2026.csv")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(dow)) %>% 
  filter(!(dow %in% c("na", "none"))) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  mutate(dow = case_when(str_detect(dow, "04-0063") ~ "04-0063",
                         TRUE ~ dow))

#mercury data
hg <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                             "Shared drives",
                             "Hansen Lab",
                             "RESEARCH PROJECTS",
                             "MAISRC Mercury Pathways 53.2",
                             "Data",
                         "allfish_data_04042024_JLO.csv")) 

#clean hg data now
clean_dowid <- function(id) {
  if (is.na(id) || id == "") return(NA_character_)  # Handle NA values
  id_clean <- str_replace_all(id, "-", "")  # Remove dashes
  return(id_clean)
}

hg <- hg %>% 
  mutate(dow = map_chr(DOWID, clean_dowid))
rm(clean_dowid)

#build xwalk to lagos data
lake_link <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                                "Shared drives",
                                "Hansen Lab",
                                "RESEARCH PROJECTS",
                                "Statewide mercury modeling",
                                "Data",
                                "Covariate Data",
                                "lake_link.csv")) %>% 
  distinct(lake_nhdid, .keep_all = T) %>% 
  rename(nhdid = lake_nhdid)

#crosswalk for lagos id to nhdhr
xwalk <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                          "Shared drives",
                          "Hansen Lab",
                          "LAGOS data extraction",
                          "lake_link.csv"))
glimpse(xwalk)

#land use land cover data
lagos_watershed_lulc <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                          "Shared drives",
                          "Hansen Lab",
                          "LAGOS data extraction",
                          "lagos_watershed_lulc.csv"))
glimpse(lagos_watershed_lulc)

most_recent_landcover <- lagos_watershed_lulc %>% 
  filter(year == 2016) %>% 
  select(-spatial_division,
         -year,
         -datacoveragepct,
         -precision) %>% 
  rename(lagoslakeid = zoneid)
rm(lagos_watershed_lulc)

#watershed attributes data
lagos_watershed <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                          "Shared drives",
                          "Hansen Lab",
                          "LAGOS data extraction",
                          "lake_watersheds.csv"))
glimpse(lagos_watershed)

#join lagos data#
covary <- lagos_watershed %>% 
  left_join(most_recent_landcover) %>% 
  mutate(state_keep = case_when(str_detect(ws_states, "MN") ~ "y",
                                TRUE ~ "n")) %>% 
  filter(state_keep == "y")
rm(lagos_watershed,
   most_recent_landcover)

#lets just grab the lagos id, nhdhr, name, and coords for cross walking
xwalk <- xwalk %>% 
  distinct(lagoslakeid, lake_nhdid, .keep_all = T)

#grabbing cross walk information via lagos id (really interested in the nhdhr)
covary <- covary %>% 
  left_join(xwalk, relationship = "one-to-one")
rm(xwalk)

# fisheries surveys 2026
dnr_fish <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                             "Shared drives",
                             "Hansen Lab",
                             "RESEARCH PROJECTS",
                             "MAISRC Mercury Pathways 53.2",
                             "Data",
                             "2026_fish_sampling_dnr.csv")) %>% 
  filter(water_type != "Stream") %>% 
  mutate(dow = as.character(dow),
         dow = str_pad(dow, width = 8, side = "left", pad = "0")) %>% 
  select(dow,
         area_name,
         survey_type,
         survey_components_proposed,
         notes) %>% 
  group_by(dow, area_name) %>%
  #some lakes have standard and targeted due, collapse those
  summarise(
    survey_type = paste(unique(survey_type), collapse = ", "),
    survey_components_proposed = paste(unique(survey_components_proposed), collapse = ", "),
    notes = paste(unique(na.omit(notes)), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>% 
  #make sure bemidji matches invaion dataset
  mutate(dow = case_when(dow == "04013002" ~ "04013000",
                         dow == "73020002" ~ "73020000",
                         TRUE ~ dow))
```

# Clean data
```{r}
#fix invasion data
clean_lake_ids <- function(id) {
  if (is.na(id) || id == "") return(NA_character_)  # Handle NA or empty values
  
  id_clean <- as.character(id)  # Ensure it's a character string
  id_clean <- str_replace_all(id_clean, "-", "")  # Remove dashes
  
  # Ensure it has a leading zero if it originally had one
  if (nchar(id_clean) < 6) {
    id_clean <- str_pad(id_clean, width = 6, pad = "0", side = "left")
  }
  
  # Ensure it's 8 digits long
  if (nchar(id_clean) == 6) {
    id_clean <- paste0(id_clean, "00")  # Append "00" if only 6 digits long
  }
  
  return(id_clean)
}

#apply cleaning to data
zm_ssw <- zm_ssw %>% 
  mutate(dow = sapply(dow, clean_lake_ids))
rm(clean_lake_ids)

#pivot so we have one lake per row, two columns for invasive species (one for zm and one for starry)
zm_ssw <- zm_ssw %>% 
  select(dow, ais, year_infested) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = ais,
              values_from = year_infested) %>% 
  rename(zm_year_infested = `zebra mussel`,
         ssw_year_infested = `starry stonewort`)

# looking at lakes across the state with zm and ssw
zm_ssw_lakes <- zm_ssw %>% 
  filter(!is.na(dow)) %>% 
  filter(!(str_detect(dow, "none")))
rm(zm_ssw, lake_link)

#add covarites 
zm_ssw_lakes <- zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  local_to_lagos(from_colname = "dow",states = "mn") %>% 
  mutate(lagoslakeid = as.numeric(lagos.id)) %>% 
  left_join(covary)

dnr_fish_map_data <- dnr_fish %>% 
  local_to_lagos(from_colname = "dow", states = "mn") %>% 
  mutate(lagoslakeid = as.numeric(lagos.id)) %>% 
  left_join(covary) 
rm(covary)

#add some mercury info
hg_years <- hg %>% 
  group_by(dow) %>% 
  summarise(n_hg_years = n_distinct(YEARCOLL))

zm_ssw_lakes <- zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  left_join(hg_years)

dnr_fish_map_data <- dnr_fish_map_data %>% 
  left_join(hg_years)
rm(hg_years)

# add in 2026 fisheries surveys
zm_ssw_lakes <- zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  left_join(dnr_fish) %>% 
  mutate(to_be_surveyed_fish = case_when(!is.na(survey_type) ~ "y",
                                         TRUE ~ "n"))

#only keep uninvaded lakes for fish surveys mapping on the one object created for this
dnr_fish_map_data <- dnr_fish_map_data %>% 
  anti_join(zm_ssw_lakes, by = "dow")
```


# 2025 continuation lake selection exploration 
1. Count of lakes across the state with zm, ssw, or both?
2. Prior hg data?
3. Do we know anything about its abundance?
*note that some dows may be better to be a parent dow (bemidji has 00 ending in infested waters but 01 or 02 for hg*

I added in if lakes of the five primary fisheries areas were going to be sampled, couple of notes on that:
-leaflet is limited in changing shapes, instead the size of the circle denotes if it will be sampled or not
-I kept all types of sampling so we still may have to think about the timing of sampling
-lakes outside of the fisheries areas that I got proposed survey data for look like the won't be sampled, but that is just a lack of data 
```{r}
zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  summarise(zm_only = sum(!is.na(zm_year_infested) & is.na(ssw_year_infested)),
            ssw_only = sum(is.na(zm_year_infested) & !is.na(ssw_year_infested)),
            zm_and_ssw = sum(!is.na(zm_year_infested) & !is.na(ssw_year_infested)))

#only starry lakes
ssw_only <- zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  filter(is.na(zm_year_infested) & !is.na(ssw_year_infested)) %>% 
  mutate(notes = case_when(dow == "04003501" ~ "zm listed with different dow",
                           dow == "04006300" ~ "ssw not listed on lakefinder",
                           TRUE ~ NA),
         invasion = "ssw only")
# upper red DOES have zm but they list zm with a different dow in list, listed wtih 04003500 for zm but 04003501 for ssw
# north twin (04006300) does not have starry listed on lake finder

ssw_only <- ssw_only %>% 
  select(dow,
         lagoslakeid,
         lake_nhdid,
         lake_namelagos,
         ws_lat_decdeg,
         ws_lon_decdeg,
         ssw_year_infested,
         zm_year_infested,
         ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,
         ws_area_ha,
         ws_lake_arearatio,
         nlcd_wetwood90_pct,
         nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,
         notes,
         invasion,
         n_hg_years,
         fish_survey = survey_type,
         fish_gears = survey_components_proposed,
         to_be_surveyed_fish)

ssw_map <- ssw_only %>%
  mutate(
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "SSW infest year: ", ssw_year_infested, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha, 1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha, 1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio, 2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct, 1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct, 1), "<br>",
      "Notes : ", notes, "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("blue", "orange"),
  domain = ssw_map$to_be_surveyed_fish
)

leaflet(ssw_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~ws_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~ws_lat_decdeg,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    fillColor = ~pal(to_be_surveyed_fish),
    popup = ~popup_text,      # click popup
    label = ~lake_namelagos   # hover name
  )
rm(ssw_map)

# both
both <- zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  filter(!is.na(zm_year_infested) & !is.na(ssw_year_infested)) %>% 
  mutate(notes = as.character(NA),
         invasion = "zm and ssw")

both <- both %>% 
  select(dow,
         lagoslakeid,
         lake_nhdid,
         lake_namelagos,
         ws_lat_decdeg,
         ws_lon_decdeg,
         ssw_year_infested,
         zm_year_infested,
         ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,
         ws_area_ha,
         ws_lake_arearatio,
         nlcd_wetwood90_pct,
         nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,
         notes,
         invasion,
         n_hg_years,
         fish_survey = survey_type,
         fish_gears = survey_components_proposed,
         to_be_surveyed_fish)

both_map <- both %>%
  mutate(
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "SSW infest year: ", ssw_year_infested, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha, 1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha, 1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio, 2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct, 1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct, 1), "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("blue", "orange"),
  domain = both_map$to_be_surveyed_fish
)

leaflet(both_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~ws_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~ws_lat_decdeg,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    fillColor = ~pal(to_be_surveyed_fish),
    popup = ~popup_text,      # click popup
    label = ~lake_namelagos   # hover name
  )

rm(both_map)

#map together
combined_map <- bind_rows(ssw_only, both)

combined_map <- combined_map %>%
  mutate(
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "Invasion: ", invasion, "<br>",
      "SSW year: ", ssw_year_infested, "<br>",
      "ZM year: ", zm_year_infested, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha,1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio,2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Notes: ", ifelse(is.na(notes),"",notes), "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("green", "darkred"),
  domain = combined_map$invasion
)

combined <- leaflet(combined_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~ws_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~ws_lat_decdeg,
    fillColor = ~pal(invasion),
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    radius = ~ifelse(to_be_surveyed_fish == "y", 8, 4),
    popup = ~popup_text,
    label = ~lake_namelagos
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    "bottomright",
    pal = pal,
    values = ~invasion,
    title = "Lake category"
  ) 
combined
#htmlwidgets::saveWidget(combined, "ssw_zm_map.html", selfcontained = TRUE)



#add only zm
zm_only <- zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  filter(!is.na(zm_year_infested) & is.na(ssw_year_infested)) %>% 
  mutate(notes = as.character(NA),
         invasion = "zm only")

zm_only <- zm_only %>% 
  select(dow,
         lagoslakeid,
         lake_nhdid,
         lake_namelagos,
         ws_lat_decdeg,
         ws_lon_decdeg,
         ssw_year_infested,
         zm_year_infested,
         ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,
         ws_area_ha,
         ws_lake_arearatio,
         nlcd_wetwood90_pct,
         nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,
         notes,
         invasion,
         n_hg_years,
         fish_survey = survey_type,
         fish_gears = survey_components_proposed,
         to_be_surveyed_fish)

zm_only_map <- zm_only %>%
  mutate(
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "SSW infest year: ", ssw_year_infested, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha, 1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha, 1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio, 2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct, 1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct, 1), "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

leaflet(zm_only_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~ws_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~ws_lat_decdeg,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    popup = ~popup_text,      # click popup
    label = ~lake_namelagos   # hover name
  )
rm(zm_only_map)

###all###
#map together
all_map <- bind_rows(ssw_only, both, zm_only)

all_map <- all_map %>%
  mutate(
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "Invasion: ", invasion, "<br>",
      "SSW year: ", ssw_year_infested, "<br>",
      "ZM year: ", zm_year_infested, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha,1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio,2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Notes: ", ifelse(is.na(notes),"",notes), "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("green", "darkred", "lightblue"),
  domain = all_map$invasion
)

combined <- leaflet(all_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~ws_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~ws_lat_decdeg,
    fillColor = ~pal(invasion),
    color = "black",
    radius = ~ifelse(to_be_surveyed_fish == "y", 12, 4), 
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    popup = ~popup_text,
    label = ~lake_namelagos
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    "bottomright",
    pal = pal,
    values = ~invasion,
    title = "Lake category"
  ) 
combined
#htmlwidgets::saveWidget(combined, "ssw_zm_map_all.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

###############short list of lakes#########################################
#Spicer area
# Both SSW and ZM - Koronis, Grand, Long, or Minnewaska, Medicine?
# SSW - Carnelian, maybe Two River Lake?
# ZM- Green, Buffalo

# Bemidji area
# Both - Leech Lake, POkegama (newer SSW inv), Wolf, also like Winnie
# SSW, Moose, Turtle
# ZM - Plantagenet (newish inv)

short_list <- all_map %>% 
  filter(dow %in% c("73020000",
                    "73005500",
                    "34006600",
                    "27010400",
                    "61013000",
                    "73013800",
                    "73003800",
                    "86009000",
                    "34007900",
                    
                    "11020300",
                    "31053200",
                    "11014700",
                    "04007900",
                    "04015900",
                    "04001100",
                    "29015600"
                    ))

short_list_map <- short_list %>%
  mutate(
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "Invasion: ", invasion, "<br>",
      "SSW year: ", ssw_year_infested, "<br>",
      "ZM year: ", zm_year_infested, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha,1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio,2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Notes: ", ifelse(is.na(notes),"",notes), "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("green", "darkred", "lightblue"),
  domain = short_list_map$invasion
)

short_list_display <- leaflet(short_list_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~ws_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~ws_lat_decdeg,
    fillColor = ~pal(invasion),
    color = "black",
    radius = ~ifelse(to_be_surveyed_fish == "y", 12, 4), 
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    popup = ~popup_text,
    label = ~lake_namelagos
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    "bottomright",
    pal = pal,
    values = ~invasion,
    title = "Lake category"
  ) 
short_list_display
#htmlwidgets::saveWidget(short_list_display, "short_list_display.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

#clean up work space
rm(pal,
   short_list,
   short_list_map,
   short_list_display,
   combined_map,
   combined
   )
```

# Uninvaded lakes with 2026 fisheries survey 
```{r}
fish_map <- dnr_fish_map_data %>%
  rename(fish_survey = survey_type,
         fish_gears = survey_components_proposed) %>% 
  mutate(
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha,1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio,2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Notes: ", ifelse(is.na(notes),"",notes), "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

fish_map_display <- leaflet(fish_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~lake_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~lake_lat_decdeg,
    color = "black",
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    popup = ~popup_text,
    label = ~lake_namelagos
  )
fish_map_display
#htmlwidgets::saveWidget(fish_map_display, "fish_surveys_uninvaded.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
rm(fish_map_display)
```

# "Finalized" lakes
```{r}
final <- bind_rows(all_map, fish_map)

#filter for the lakes
final_map <- final %>% 
  filter(dow %in% c("73003800",
                    "73013800",
                    "34007900",
                    "86009000",
                    "73020000",
                    "27010400",
                    "34008600",
                    "73003700",
                    "21014500",
                    "61013000",
                    "34016900",
                    
                    #leech area
                    "04001100",
                    "04015900",
                    "29015600",
                    "11041300",
                    "11020300",
                    "04007900",
                    "11050500",
                    "11016700",
                    "04006900",
                    "11020100",
                    "11014700",
                    "11037100")) %>% 
    mutate(invasion = case_when(is.na(invasion) ~ "None",
                                TRUE ~ invasion),
           backup = case_when(dow %in% c("04006900",
                    "11020100",
                    "11014700",
                    "11037100",
                    "21014500",
                    "61013000",
                    "34016900"
                    ) ~ "y",
                    TRUE ~ "n"),
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<b>", lake_namelagos, "</b><br>",
      "DOW: ", dow, "<br>",
      "Invasion: ", invasion, "<br>",
      "SSW year: ", ssw_year_infested, "<br>",
      "ZM year: ", zm_year_infested, "<br>",
      "Lake area (ha): ", round(ws_focallakewaterarea_ha,1), "<br>",
      "Watershed area (ha): ", round(ws_area_ha,1), "<br>",
      "WS:Lake ratio: ", round(ws_lake_arearatio,2), "<br>",
      "Wooded wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetwood90_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Emergent wetland %: ", round(nlcd_wetemerg95_pct,1), "<br>",
      "Hg Years : ", n_hg_years, "<br>",
      "Notes: ", ifelse(is.na(notes),"",notes), "<br>",
      "Fish Survey : ", fish_survey, "<br>",
      "Fish Gears : ", fish_gears
    )
  )

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("green", "darkred", "lightblue", "black"),
  domain = final_map$invasion
)

final_display <- leaflet(final_map) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~ws_lon_decdeg,
    lat = ~ws_lat_decdeg,
    fillColor = ~pal(invasion),
    color = "black",
    radius = ~ifelse(backup == "y", 3, 10), 
    weight = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    popup = ~popup_text,
    label = ~lake_namelagos
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    "bottomright",
    pal = pal,
    values = ~invasion,
    title = "Lake category"
  ) 
final_display
#htmlwidgets::saveWidget(final_display, "final_display.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
```


# Lakes in Prior Study
```{r}
study_dows <- read_csv(file.path("D:",
                             "Shared drives",
                             "Hansen Lab",
                             "RESEARCH PROJECTS",
                             "MAISRC Mercury Pathways 53.2",
                             "Data",
                             "foodweb_lakes.csv")) %>% 
  mutate(dow = as.character(dow),
         dow = str_pad(dow, width = 8, side = "left", pad = "0")) %>% 
  mutate(parent_dow = substr(dow, 1, 6))


zm_ssw_lakes <- zm_ssw_lakes %>% 
  mutate(parent_dow = substr(dow, 1, 6))


#join study lakes to invasion data
study_comb <- study_dows %>% 
  left_join(zm_ssw_lakes, by = "parent_dow", suffix = c("_umn", "_invasion"))

hg <- hg %>% 
   mutate(parent_dow = substr(dow, 1, 6))

#join study lake info to mercury data
study_hg <- hg %>% 
  right_join(study_comb, by = "parent_dow", suffix = c("_hg", "_umn"))

# summary of hg data from the state for our study lakes
study_hg %>% 
  group_by(dow, WATERWAY, SPEC) %>%
  summarise(n_hg = sum(!is.na(HGPPM))) %>% 
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("dow", "WATERWAY",),names_from = SPEC,values_from = n_hg) %>% 
  select(NOP, WAE, BLC, BLG, YEP, WTS, SMB, LMB) %>% 
  print(n = nrow(.))

study_comb %>% 
  left_join(hg %>% 
              select(parent_dow, WATERWAY), by = "parent_dow") %>% 
  mutate(invasion = case_when(!is.na(zm_year_infested) & is.na(ssw_year_infested) ~ "zm_only",
                              is.na(zm_year_infested) & !is.na(ssw_year_infested) ~ "ssw_only",
                              TRUE ~ "both")) %>% 
  distinct(dow_umn, WATERWAY, invasion) %>% 
  arrange(invasion) %>% 
  print(n = nrow(.))

#how many samples pre/post invasion?
#first zm
study_hg %>% 
  filter(!is.na(zm_year_infested)) %>%
  filter(SPEC %in% c("NOP", "WAE")) %>% 
  group_by(dow, WATERWAY, SPEC, zm_year_infested) %>%
  summarise(n_hg_pre = sum(YEARCOLL < zm_year_infested),
            n_hg_post = sum(YEARCOLL >= zm_year_infested)) %>% 
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("dow", "WATERWAY", "zm_year_infested"),names_from = SPEC,values_from = c("n_hg_pre", "n_hg_post")) %>% 
  relocate(n_hg_post_NOP, .after = n_hg_pre_NOP) %>% 
  print(n = nrow(.)) 

#now ssw
study_hg %>% 
  filter(!is.na(ssw_year_infested)) %>%
  filter(SPEC %in% c("NOP", "WAE")) %>% 
  group_by(dow, WATERWAY, SPEC, ssw_year_infested) %>%
  summarise(n_hg_pre = sum(YEARCOLL < ssw_year_infested),
            n_hg_post = sum(YEARCOLL >= ssw_year_infested)) %>% 
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("dow", "WATERWAY", "ssw_year_infested"),names_from = SPEC,values_from = c("n_hg_pre", "n_hg_post")) %>% 
  relocate(n_hg_post_NOP, .after = n_hg_pre_NOP) %>% 
  print(n = nrow(.)) 

# Big Cormorant? - quite a few samples but spread across species 
study_hg %>% 
  filter(dow %in% c("03057600", "11014700", "34007900", "86025200")) %>% 
  filter(SPEC %in% c("WAE", "NOP")) %>% 
  mutate(zm = case_when(YEARCOLL < zm_year_infested ~ "pre",
                        YEARCOLL >= zm_year_infested ~ "post")) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(LGTHIN, log(HGPPM), color = zm)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(LGTHIN, log(HGPPM), color = zm), method = "lm") +
  facet_grid(WATERWAY~SPEC)
```

# looking at kornois - was it always just high in mercury?
```{r}
koronis <- hg %>% 
  filter(str_detect(WATERWAY, "ORONIS"))

koronis %>% 
  filter(SPEC == "WAE") %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_point(aes(LGTHIN, log(HGPPM), color = as.factor(YEARCOLL))) +
  geom_smooth(aes(LGTHIN, log(HGPPM), color = as.factor(YEARCOLL)), method = "lm") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = log(0.22)) 
```
